title: aster macraeanus
intro: Aster macraeanus, also known as Chinese Aster or Macraea Aster, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Aster macraeanus include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving digestion, while also having antioxidant and anti-aging properties. Herbal preparations of Aster macraeanus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
